hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 110 m from property

snippets.snippet: Dekat dengan kedai jualan, makanan dan eiger shop.

address.address1: 18, Jalan Twk. Mohammad Daudsyah, Peunayong, Kuta Alam, Banda Aceh, Aceh, Sumatera, Indonesia, Banda Aceh

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Dear Raja,

Terima kasih telah meluangkan waktu untuk membagikan ulasan Anda kepada kami.

Kami sangat senang mengetahui bahwa Anda merasa puas dengan konsep syariah, fasilitas yang baik, respons staf yang cepat dan ramah, serta kebersihan yang terjaga selama menginap di OYO 94799 Siwah Hotel. Kami juga senang lokasi hotel kami dapat memberikan kemudahan akses ke tempat makan di sekitar.

Apresiasi dan rekomendasi Anda menjadi motivasi bagi kami untuk terus menjaga kualitas layanan terbaik bagi seluruh tamu.

Kami berharap dapat menyambut Anda kembali di lain kesempatan.

Warm regards,
Ethan
OYO 94799 Siwah Hotel
comments.reviewComments: Sharia-based, good facilities, quick and friendly response, very good cleanliness, recommended for resting after a few days of travel, close to street food.
comments.originalComment: Berbasis syariah, Fasilitas Baik, Respon Cepat dan Ramah, Kebersihan sangat baik, Rekomendasi untuk beristirahat dalam waktu beberapa hari bepergian, dekat dengan makanan pinggir jalan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is located in a very strategic location. The service is very friendly, the place is also very clean, safe, and comfortable. This is the third time staying here. Very satisfying.
comments.reviewTitle: Affordable hotel, but not cheap quality.
comments.originalTitle: Hotel Murah, tapi kualitas gak murahan
comments.originalComment: Hotel berada di lokasi yang sangat strategis. Pelayanan sangat ramah, tempat juga sangat bersih, aman dan nyaman. Ini merupakan kali ketiga menginap disini. Sangat memuaskan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable and pleasant, the rooms are clean and well-maintained. The reception service is very friendly and helpful, and the location is strategic, close to various places which makes access easy to anywhere. This is my second stay, and it consistently provides satisfying service quality and comfort.
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya nyaman dan menyenangkan, kamar bersih dan terawat dengan baik. Pelayanan resepsionis sangat ramah dan membantu serta lokasinya strategis, dekat ke berbagai tempat sehingga memudahkan akses kemana saja. Ini adalah pengalaman menginap kedua, dan tetap konsisten memberikan kualitas pelayanan serta kenyamanan yang memuaskan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is just ordinary on the outside, but once inside, it's comfortable. The texture of the old building is nice, but the cleanliness is great. The staff here are very nice and enjoy chatting with us, making it feel less stiff.
comments.originalComment:
Hotel diluar biasa saja tapi pas udh di dalam nyaman 
Texture bangunan lama tapi kebersihan mantap. Staff disini baik2 suka ngbrol sama kita langsung jdinya kita tidak kaku

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Overall was okay except the toilet condition and room smell. Hopefully both will be improved later.
